calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jul-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 7/20/26. (No earlier availability.)
(1) An amended accounting petition was filed on 5/26/26, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing.
(2) The proof of service filed on 5/26/26 shows the incorrect caption of the pleading to be heard in item 1 of the Notice of Hearing. (A proof of service attached to a petition is meaningless in Probate.)
(3) Notice does not appear to have been given to the Court-appointed attorney for the Conservatee, who has not yet been discharged.
(4) No Notice of Conservatee's Death has been filed yet.
Courtesy copies of the amended petition and any subsequently filed papers must be received by the assigned examiner by 7/6/26.
The amended petition has not yet been fully reviewed, as no courtesy copy has been received by the assigned examiner.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
